scenario.name: Some determinable business situation (empty feature name)

step.name: Given the following people exist: | name | email | phone | | Aila | aila@email.com | 123 | | Joe | joe@email.com | 234 |
When some action by the actor
Then some testable outcome is achieved
And something else we can check happens too
And some other precondition with doc string """ this is comment """
When some action by the actor
Then some testable outcome is achieved
* something else we can check happens too
But I don't see something else

scenario.name: feeding a cow <name> yum yum yum (empty feature name)

step.name: When we calculate the feeding requirements
Then the energy should be 26500 MJ

scenario.name: feeding a cow <name> yum yum yum (empty feature name)

step.name: When we calculate the feeding requirements
Then the energy should be 29500 MJ
